query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS test_dups, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appLinks WHERE id = 210094) AS epic_dup, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appLinks) AS total FROM appLinks WHERE name LIKE 'TEST %';
